title: Allow public links or file attachments for email!
excerpt:
Please allow us to attach files from the File Column to emails! 
Or if not a direct attached file, please allow us to have public links! Why can’t we set Public/Private links in the specific Column’s Settings?

posts.author: lioncladowls (Collin Oswald)
posts.cookedHtml:
Please allow us to attach files from the File Column to emails!
Or if not a direct attached file, please allow us to have public links! Why can’t we set Public/Private links in the specific Column’s Settings?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @lioncladowls - we definitely hear you, and will add this to the growing feedback we’ve received! We did want to mention that the emails and activities app allows you to attach files directly from the file column into your emails, incase this is something you’d consider using in the meantime - Emails & Activities on monday.com

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: A post was merged into an existing topic: Add attachments to email integrations

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: To ensure we have all the votes counted and put emphasis on this need, we have merged this request into an existing feature request. Every quarter we take the features with the top votes to our development team for a response. Your opinion matters to us, so keep the votes up!
